text: As Chloe Castillo began the introductions, Luka Shaffer suddenly let out a blood-curdling scream. Everyone whirled around to see Luka Shaffer pointing at a nearby sculpture, Luka Shaffer's face drained of color. Chloe Castillo's eyes widened in horror as Chloe Castillo saw what had caused such terror – the sculpture, which Chloe Castillo knew to be a static installation, was slowly turning its head towards the group.
context: This excerpt describes the moment the park comes alive, marked by a participant's scream and a sculpture moving on its own, initiating the supernatural events of the story.
